title: Respect @BeforeTransaction/@AfterTransaction contract
description: Spring methods annotated with @BeforeTransaction or @AfterTransaction must follow the expected contract to ensure correct transactional test behavior. Not respecting this can cause unpredictable results and maintenance issues. Refactor methods to comply with Spring's transactional requirements.
recommendation: Ensure all @BeforeTransaction and @AfterTransaction methods follow Spring's contract for transactional tests.

checks.message: Ensure all @BeforeTransaction and @AfterTransaction methods follow Spring's contract for transactional tests.
